## Out of scope?

murmure stays intentionally narrow. The following are explicitly out of scope and will likely be politely declined:

- transcript export to file
- speaker diarization
- multi-language switching mid-stream
- cloud sync of settings
- crash reporting / telemetry

If your idea is in that list, feel free to file it anyway as a discussion — but expect a polite no.
